panel_intro: The clearer you can be, the faster we can fix it. Reports with reproduction steps usually get fixed first.
field_what_happened_placeholder: I tried to publish the story and got a 500 error.
field_what_happened_why: Tells us the symptom you saw.
field_expected_label: What did you expect to happen?
field_expected_placeholder: The story to publish without errors.
field_expected_why: Often more useful than the bug itself — it tells us how the tool was meant to feel.
field_steps_why: Without these, most bugs sit unfixed.
submit_signed_in_as: You'll be sent to GitHub as @{{login}} to review and submit.
submit_toast: Issue draft opened in a new tab — submit it on GitHub to send it.
crash_intro: The page hit an error and couldn't recover. Reporting it helps us fix it faster.
crash_panel_intro: Something just crashed. Please tell us what you were doing — even one sentence helps.
crash_field_what_label: What were you doing when this happened?
crash_pinned_error_note: The error that just happened is included and can't be removed.
